# nuBeam Gen

nuBeam Gen is a founder-focused growth and market access advisory based in the United States.

## What We Do

We connect founders raising capital to warm introductions across our network of Family Offices, Venture Capital firms, Private Equity funds, and Hedge Funds worldwide.

Our team and advisors have backgrounds spanning $57M+ in transactions across private debt, private equity, and go-public transactions.

We provide access to $3 trillion in capital relationships built over decades.

## Who We Serve

- Founders raising $2M–$100M in debt, equity, or hybrid capital
- Companies with product-market fit seeking institutional capital
- Founders targeting Family Offices, PE funds, strategic investors, or Hedge Funds

## Services

- Raise Readiness & Positioning
- Investor Narrative Development
- Strategic Introductions to institutional investors
- Diligence Preparation
- Investor Relationship Management
- Market Intelligence Reports

## How to Engage

Applications only. Visit https://nubeam.io to apply.

## Contact

Website: https://nubeam.io
Booking: https://cal.com/nubeam-gen/dealflow
